_rationale.0: Storage-location convention (local JSON at the per-user tasks file) restates the storage record verbatim.
_rationale.1: ISO-8601 timestamp convention restates the timestamp record verbatim.
_rationale.2: Verb-first CLI convention (the two seed verbs as examples) restates the verb-first record verbatim.
_rationale.3: No-runtime-dependencies / test-framework convention restates that record verbatim.
_rationale.4: Exit-code-2-on-usage-error convention restates that record verbatim.
_rationale.5: Mutators reject an unknown id by throwing and the caller maps it to the usage exit code; this is the mutator-contract record, first applied in the complete verb.
_rationale.6: Centralized list-flag parsing in one pure function is the parse-args record.
_rationale.7: Rename-title-only, no tag/deadline re-parse, is the edit-verb record.
_rationale.10: Two test layers (pure-unit plus a subprocess wiring layer) is the second-test-layer record.
_rationale.16: An id argument must be spelled the canonical way the listing prints it is the argument-canonicality record.
_rationale.17: Enforcing the store rules on save as well as load (a save refuses an invalid list) is the both-directions record.
_rationale.18: A save stages a new file and renames it into place rather than opening the live store is the atomic-replace record.
_rationale.19: The read-only counts summary is the stats record.
_rationale.63: Changelog line for the ordering feature; same decision as the current-form ordering convention.
_rationale.64: Changelog line for the counts-summary feature; same decision as the current-form stats convention.
_rationale.66: Coverage gap: the seed line marks the two initial verbs, which predate decision-logging and have no dedicated record; its 'conventions above established' clause only back-references records already covered by the first five convention entries.
_rationale.67: Changelog line for the complete verb; the mutator-contract record was first applied here, so it is that record.
_rationale.68: Changelog line for the delete verb is the delete-verb record.
_rationale.69: Changelog line for the search verb is the search record.
_rationale.70: Changelog line for labels plus the label filter is the labels record.
_rationale.71: Changelog line for deadlines plus the deadline filter is the deadlines record.
_rationale.73: Changelog line for centralized flag validation; same decision as the current-form parse-args convention.
_rationale.75: Coverage gap: a note about the development harness's daily run schedule, not a decision about the task tool, so no record corresponds.
_rationale.76: Coverage gap: a note about a development-harness watchdog script, not a decision about the task tool, so no record corresponds.
_rationale.77: Coverage gap: a note about the harness's weekly feedback-review process, not a decision about the task tool, so no record corresponds.
